lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: I kill you human!

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: Go away smelly human!

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: What you doing here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm here to kill all you goblins!

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: I kill you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm just looking around.

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: Me not sure that allowed. You have to check with generals.

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: Happy goblin new century!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Happy new century!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the goblin new century?

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: Goblin century mark year of big battle on Plain of Mud. That when Big High War God give us commandments.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who is the Big High War God?

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: Big High War God take goblins and make them strong! Without him, we small and weak and stupid. But thanks to Big High War God, we most powerful race in Gielinor!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Umm... you're clearly not the most powerful race in Gielinor.

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: Not to doubt word of Big High War God! I kill you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the goblin commandments?

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: Slay enemies of Big High War God! Not show mercy! Not run from battle! Not doubt word of Big High War God!

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: Without commandments we not know right from wrong. We be like other races who not know war is good!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where is the Plain of Mud?

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: That goblin secret! No human ever find Plain of Mud!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need to go.

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: Brown armour best!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why is brown best?

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: General Wartface and General Bentnoze both say it is. And normally they never agree!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But you're still wearing green armour!

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: Um... my brown armour getting wash.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But you're still wearing red armour!

lines.speaker: Goblin
lines.text: It not red, it just red-ish brown!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err, okay.
